manipulated_prompt_obj.inputs:
<BOS_TOKEN><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|USER_TOKEN|>You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can strood, eucty and pyell.

Your goal for this game is: Put the oroust in the inchan, the book on the aciong and the plate on the aciong.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a encal now. There are a wardrobe, a bed, a book and a oroust. The wardrobe is closed. The book is on the floor. The oroust is on the bed. There is a passage to a hallway here.<|END_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|CHATBOT_TOKEN|>
